system.requirement: Once you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} (formidable or greater) with a seasoned warrior and train with them…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by sizing up your foe in a fight, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} in a charged situation which may lead to a fight, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
When you study or train in a new weapon or technique, you may obtain and upgrade that comat talent for 1 fewer experience.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3129f4caa4754caf]{Take Decisive Action} in a bad spot to turn the tide with a sudden change of weapon or technique, mark prgress before rolling.
